negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_71ab80d3-bd04-4c7c-a679-574e2078951e
prompt: A woman walks through an out-of-focus urban setting, captured in a medium-eye-level static shot that initially focuses on her from the left half of the frame, moving diagonally to the left. She wears a pink and purple tartan shirt with short sleeves, white shorts, and a dark band around her left wrist. Her hair is tied back in a ponytail, and a white bag with a large beige and red design hangs from her right shoulder. As she continues her path, the camera slowly pans left and slightly downward, revealing another woman in the foreground, exiting a building on the right. This second woman has dark hair tied back in a bun, wears a tank top with a design partially obscured by a sheer long-sleeved blouse, a pearl necklace, and earrings, and carries a black handbag around her right shoulder. She stops in the center, slightly turned diagonally to the left, facing the first woman. As the camera continues to pan, a man enters from the opposite side and aligns himself with the second woman, standing on her left. He is taller, with dark, short hair, a light-colored top, and a dark strap around his right shoulder. The first woman looks towards him as he approaches.  The scene is set in a modern architectural space with reflective glass surfaces, creating a 1-point perspective. The furthest point of the background is initially on the left, with the building extending to the back and mirroring the surroundings, giving the impression of an enclosed glass corridor. Large green parasols and dark tables and chairs line the tall glass wall, through which one can see a large staircase and two trees. People are seated on the chairs and walking in the background, with more greenery visible further back. The lighting is dim, with daylight reflected in the walls, adding to the subdued atmosphere.
